task_yaml.task:
This is a single-position Gomoku (Five-in-a-Row) puzzle. Find the single best
move for the side to play — not a whole game, just the one optimal move on
this board.

The position is at:

    /tmp_workspace/clawbench/sources/board.txt

It is a 15x15 board. `X` is Black (the side to move), `O` is White, `.` is an
empty point. Rows are 0-14 top to bottom; columns are 0-14 left to right. It
is Black's turn. Black wins by making five X in a row (horizontal, vertical,
or diagonal).

Analyze the position and determine Black's globally best move this turn.
Report it as a (row, column) coordinate using the 0-indexed convention above,
and explain why it is best.

Save your answer to `/tmp_workspace/results/best_move.json` with fields
`row`, `col`, and a short `reasoning`, plus any analysis notes under
`/tmp_workspace/results/`.
